description_long: This is a cylindrical brick factory building with two main levels, each featuring large, circular industrial-style windows with radial muntins. The structure is topped with a conical, tan-colored roof that has a geometric pattern and a small central cap. Yellow industrial pipes run vertically and horizontally along the exterior, connecting both levels and extending to the ground, suggesting utility or ventilation functions. The lower level has a small, brown door with a window, and additional round windows are distributed around the building. The brickwork is light tan with subtle color variation, giving the building a classic, slightly whimsical industrial appearance. The overall design is compact and stylized, with no visible smokestacks or rooftop machinery.
description: A cylindrical brick factory building with a conical roof, large round industrial windows, and yellow exterior pipes. The structure features a small entry door and a whimsical, compact industrial design.
description_view_0: The side view highlights two large round windows, yellow pipes running vertically and horizontally, and the conical roof's geometric pattern.
description_view_1: The front view shows the main entry door, a large round window above it, and a side pipe extending outward at ground level.
description_view_2: This view displays a large round window on the upper level, two smaller round windows on the lower level, and the continuation of the yellow piping.
description_view_3: The rear view reveals the uninterrupted brick surface, a vertical yellow pipe, and two small round windows on the lower level.
